title: Christmas Candy Cane Pathway LED Lights with Timer Battery Powered Outdoor Xmas Holiday Garden Decor Weather-Resistant Xmas Driveway Stakes Festive Outdoor Decoration (4 PK MULTICOLOR)
features: 𝐅𝐄𝐒𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐘 𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍 – Brighten your outdoor Christmas décor with these colorful LED candy cane lights, perfect for lining pathways, driveways, gardens, and patios. The vibrant multicolor design adds a classic and cheerful touch to your home’s exterior.

𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 & 𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 – Built with high-quality, weather-resistant materials, these lights are designed to endure rain, snow, and winter cold, ensuring they stay functional and decorative throughout the entire holiday season.

𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐓𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 𝐅𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐄 – Featuring a built-in timer, these lights automatically turn on for 6 hours and off for 18 hours, providing effortless, energy-efficient lighting and hassle-free operation to enhance your holiday display.

𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐈𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐖𝐈𝐓𝐇 𝐒𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐃𝐘 𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐊𝐄𝐒 – Comes with durable stakes that securely anchor the lights in grass, soil, or any outdoor surface, making installation quick and simple to create an eye-catching and festive atmosphere along walkways, driveways, or garden borders.

𝐁𝐀𝐓𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑𝐄𝐃 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐅𝐋𝐄𝐗𝐈𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐂𝐄𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓 – No need for outlets! Powered by 3 AA batteries (not included), these lights offer versatile placement options, allowing you to decorate areas with limited or no access to power outlets.
description: Product description h2>Christmas Candy Cane LED Pathway Lights with Timer Bring the festive spirit to your home this holiday season with these Christmas Candy Cane LED Pathway Lights . Featuring vibrant red and white candy cane designs, these lights are perfect for illuminating your driveway, pathways, garden, or patio with a cheerful touch of Christmas magic. The multicolor LED lights add a dazzling glow that enhances your outdoor décor and creates an enchanting holiday atmosphere. Key Features: Festive Candy Cane Design: The classic red and white candy cane shape brings a traditional Christmas vibe to your outdoor decorations. These lights are ideal for lining walkways, driveways, and garden borders. Weather-Resistant & Durable: Made from high-quality materials, these LED lights are designed to withstand the harsh winter elements, from rain to snow. They remain durable and reliable throughout the holiday season. Convenient Timer Function: The built-in timer ensures that the lights automatically turn on for 6 hours and off for 18 hours, providing a hassle-free holiday glow that saves energy and extends battery life. Easy Installation: With included sturdy stakes, you can easily place the candy cane lights in grass, soil, or any outdoor surface. The simple setup makes it easy to transform your yard into a festive wonderland in minutes. Battery Powered: No outlets? No problem! These lights are powered by 3 AA batteries (not included), giving you the flexibility to place them anywhere outdoors, even in areas without electrical access. These Battery-Powered LED Candy Cane Lights are the perfect addition to your holiday décor. Whether you're decorating your garden, lining a driveway, or adding a festive touch to your patio, these lights create a warm, welcoming glow that everyone will enjoy. Note: Batteries not included. Requires 3 AA batteries per light for operation. Safety Warning Outdoor use only. Keep away from flammable materials. Do not allow children to play on or near the display. Store in a dry place when not in use.
